featureName: Email Reply — Wire Up + CC + UX Polish
description: Wire the email reply composer to actually send via SMTP, add CC field, auto-focus textarea, and use correct from-address based on receiving connection.

userStories.title: Auto-focus textarea when reply box opens
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, when I click Repondre, the reply textarea should auto-focus so I can start typing immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking Repondre opens the reply box AND focuses the textarea
Cursor is blinking in the textarea without requiring a click
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: useRef + useEffect with 50ms delay for DOM render

userStories.title: Wire reply to actually send via SMTP API
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, when I click Send Reply, the email is actually sent via /api/emails/send using the correct email_connection_id from the original email.
acceptanceCriteria: handleReply in email-detail calls EmailClientService.sendEmail with correct params
emailConnectionId is taken from email.email_connection_id
inReplyToEmailId is passed for proper threading
to is set to email.sender_email (from_address of original)
subject is Re: original subject
Toast shows success/error after send
Reply box closes and text resets after successful send
Send button shows loading state during send
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Reply handled directly in email-detail.tsx, removed stub from mail-client.tsx. Guard against duplicate Re: prefix.

userStories.title: Add CC field to reply composer with add/remove
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I can add CC recipients to my reply. The CC field pre-fills with the original emails CC addresses (if any) and I can add/remove addresses.
acceptanceCriteria: CC field is visible in the reply composer below the To line
Pre-fills with original emails cc_addresses (if any)
User can add new CC addresses (input + Enter or comma)
User can remove CC addresses (X button on each badge)
CC is passed to the send API
API route passes cc to SMTPService
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: CC field with badge display, add via Enter/comma/blur, remove via X. Pre-fills from email.cc_addresses. Passed through client service + API route.

userStories.title: French localization + show from-address
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, the reply composer shows which email address Im replying FROM, and all labels are in French.
acceptanceCriteria: Reply header shows Repondre a sender_name instead of English
From line shows which email account will send: De: arthur@seido-app.com
Buttons say Annuler and Envoyer instead of Cancel/Send Reply
Placeholder says Ecrivez votre reponse...
Badge says Brouillon instead of Draft
Typecheck passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: All labels in French: Répondre à, De:, À:, Objet:, Cc:, Brouillon, Annuler, Envoyer, Envoi en cours... + from-address shown via recipient_email
